A small block B of mass 0.25 kg is released from rest at a point O on a smooth horizontal surface. After its release the velocity of B is v m s⁻¹ when its displacement is x m from O. The force acting on B has magnitude (2 + 0.3x²) N and is directed horizontally away from O.
